heading: Transportation of a probationer
label: 3604 Transportation of a probationer
notes: Effective DateSection effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of this section, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 1, 1987section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: transportation to the place to which he is required to proceed as a condition of his probation; and

children.label: b
children.text: money, not to exceed such amount as the Attorney General may prescribe, for subsistence expenses while traveling to his destination.
